monitors.name: mcp-server-errors
monitors.description: Obsidian MCP server error log — surfaces ERROR/FATAL/uncaughtException from the server log in real time

monitors.name: vault-file-changes
monitors.description: Vault file change watcher — polls topics/decisions directories every 30s and reports externally modified files

monitors.name: git-commit-watcher
monitors.description: Git commit watcher — polls active project repos every 60s and reports new commits from other sessions or collaborators

monitors.name: stale-topic-check
monitors.description: Stale topic detector — one-shot scan at session start for topics not reviewed in 30+ days

monitors.name: build-watcher
monitors.description: Build error watcher — tails /tmp/*-build.log files for TypeScript and build errors across any project

monitors.name: bridge-restart-watch
monitors.description: Claude Chat Bridge lifecycle watcher — polls launchctl every 3s and on PID change actively polls the HTTPS health endpoint until it responds, emitting RESTART DETECTED and RESTART COMPLETE events so Claude stops spamming kickstart
